mnemonics.title: Filter Types
mnemonics.content: Smoothing Filters: Box (Basic), Gaussian (Great) - Remember B.G. for Basic and Great smoothing filters

mnemonics.title: Convolution Steps
mnemonics.content: Slide, Multiply, Add, Place - SMAP for the steps in convolution

mnemonics.title: Padding Strategies
mnemonics.content: Zero, Replicate, Mirror, Wrap - Z-R-M-W going from simplest to more complex strategies

mnemonics.title: Sobel Operator Directions
mnemonics.content: Horizontal Sobel: Negative Left, Positive Right - Think of negative values on left, positive on right for horizontal edge detection

mnemonics.title: Separable Filter Advantage
mnemonics.content: 2D to 1D+1D: Double the speed, half the computation - Remember that separable filters roughly double efficiency
